# SHA256 checksums for the prebuilt memex-hermes binaries, generated by
# .github/workflows/release-please.yml during the release publish step.
#
# Format (mirrors `sha256sum` output): two-space separator between hash
# and filename, one entry per line.
#
#   <64-char sha256 hex>  memex-hermes-<os>-<arch>.{tar.gz,zip}
#
# Example:
#   abc123...  memex-hermes-linux-x64.tar.gz
#   def456...  memex-hermes-darwin-arm64.tar.gz
#
# This file is shipped in the wheel so bin/install.sh can fall back to
# the local copy if it cannot download the released checksums.txt
# (offline / air-gapped installs). Each release overwrites the values.
#
# DO NOT edit by hand outside the release workflow.
